positive: An elegant, stylized line art depiction of a whimsical forest scene. A stylized deer with graceful antlers stands in a clearing, looking towards a crescent moon. Surrounding the deer are delicate, repeating motifs of ferns, mushrooms, and entwining vines. The style should be intricate, minimalist yet detailed, resembling sophisticated Nordic folk art or tattoo flash. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical for optimal placement on apparel. Use a strong silhouette contrast against a neutral background. Color direction should be limited to deep indigo, earthy emerald green, and bone white ink on a contrasting fabric. Vector art quality, clean lines, highly printable, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low quality, watermark, text, signature, cropped, logos, trademarks, copyrighted, poorly drawn, disfigured, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy
